profile.learned_zh: 二十年辅导员经历积累的学生心理危机处理能力
profile.belief_zh: 每个学生背后都有一个家庭在期待
profile.belief_en: Behind every student is a family waiting
profile.goal_zh: 没有一个学生在自己手里出事
profile.goal_en: No student gets lost on her watch
profile.contradiction_zh: 真心关爱学生 vs 行政压力和绩效考核让人喘不过气
profile.contradiction_en: Sincerely cares vs. admin pressure is suffocating
profile.deep_zh: 多年压力导致的职业倦怠正在吞噬热情
profile.deep_en: Years of stress eroding her initial enthusiasm
profile.fear_zh: 某个学生出事了自己却不知道
profile.fear_en: A student in crisis she doesn't know about
profile.desire_zh: 所有学生平平安安毕业
profile.rhythm_zh: 全天在线，没有真正的下班时间
profile.spaces_zh: 辅导员办公室、学生宿舍、行政楼
profile.short_goal_zh: 处理今天两个学生的心理问题
profile.short_goal_en: Handle two students' mental issues today
profile.constraint_zh: 学生数量多管不过来；上级检查要交材料
profile.constraint_en: Student-to-counselor ratio too high; admin inspection pending
profile.bias_zh: 倾向过度干预学生的私人事务
profile.narrative_zh: 只要学生好好的，我辛苦点没关系
profile.narrative_en: As long as students are okay, my grind is fine
